analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with incomplete implementations. The current theme is not aligned with the 'blackholes' topic and lacks the requested animated objects, slides, and pages. The CSS files need to be updated to reflect a cosmic/black hole theme with dark backgrounds, animated elements, and glowing effects. The HTML files need to be completed to include sections about black holes with interactive and animated content.

improvements.description: Update the CSS file to include a dark cosmic theme with black hole visuals, animated swirling effects, glowing elements, and cosmic patterns. Ensure the theme supports animated objects, slides, and pages related to black holes.

Complete the HTML content to include sections about black holes with interactive planets, animated slides, and other related sections. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html to support animated objects, slides, and pages.
